html:
Eel is a Meat food item similar to Fish and can be fished in Wilds Ponds found in the Ruins and Ponds in the Toadstool setpiece. Drying an Eel on a Drying Rack will produce Small Jerky. It can also be used to replace Fish as a prerequisite in Crock Pot recipes.

Trading one Eel with the Pig King will yield five Gold Nuggets, while all other meat items yield one nugget.

Eels can be used for obtaining a large amount of gold in a relatively short amount of time via the Pig King, although by the time the player receives a large amount of Eels, they would have almost no need for gold requiring items.

However the ability to make Surf 'n' Turf while exploring the ruins can keep you fed and sane indefinitely.

Cooked Eel

Cooked Eel is obtained from cooking an Eel at a Campfire, Fire Pit, or Dwarf Star. It can be used to cook Fishsticks and Fish Tacos or as a filler in a Crock Pot. Like other cooked foods, it cannot be dried on the Drying Rack.

Usage

×5

×2

Trivia

  • Eels were added to Wilds Ponds in the Moderately Friendly Update. Previously, Wilds Ponds used to produce Fish.
  • Warly's quote, "Anguille", is the French name for the European Eel.

Gallery

  • A living Eel.
  • A dead Eel.
  • Maxwell reeling in an Eel.

“This will make a delicious meal.”
–Wilson, when examining an Eel.
“I don't like the look it's giving me!”
–Willow, when examining an Eel.
“I must cook this!”
–Wolfgang, when examining an Eel.
“An eel.”
–Wendy, when examining an Eel.
“I TOOK IT FROM ITS HOME. THIS IS FUNNY TO ME!”
–WX-78, when examining an Eel.
“It's an eel.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining an Eel.
“This should cook up nicely.”
–Woodie, when examining an Eel.
“They only exist in the depths.”
–Maxwell, when examining an Eel.
“As is, my stomach can't take it.”
–Wagstaff, when examining an Eel.
“Deliciöus, slimy snake fish.”
–Wigfrid, when examining an Eel.
“Fresh water-snake.”
–Webber, when examining an Eel.
“If you squint it's actually kind of cute.”
–Walani, when examining an Eel.
“Anguille.”
–Warly, when examining an Eel.
“Ye scalawag!”
–Woodlegs, when examining an Eel.
“A SNAKE FROM WITHINS THE WAVES”
–Wilba, when examining an Eel.
“Sea Wiggly”
–Wormwood, when examining an Eel.
“The slime makes it go down easy.”
–Wheeler, when examining an Eel.
“You're looking a little eel. Ha!”
–Winona, when examining an Eel.
“A slippery soul, that one.”
–Wortox, when examining an Eel.
“Hello long fishy!”
–Wurt, when examining an Eel.
“Look at the teeth it has!”
–Walter, when examining an Eel.
“I think I just saw it wriggle...”
–Wanda, when examining an Eel.

“Smells great!”
–Wilson, when examining a Cooked Eel.
“Fire improves everything.”
–Willow, when examining a Cooked Eel.
“Eel has been cooked.”
–Wolfgang, when examining a Cooked Eel.
“An eel that has been cooked.”
–Wendy, when examining a Cooked Eel.
“THE FLAMES HELP CONDENSE THE ENERGY.”
–WX-78, when examining a Cooked Eel.
“This eel has been cooked.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining a Cooked Eel.
“This cooked up nicely.”
–Woodie, when examining a Cooked Eel.
“It slithers all the way down.”
–Maxwell, when examining a Cooked Eel.
“Smells delicious. Perhaps I may consume it.”
–Wagstaff, when examining a Cooked Eel.
“Höt eel!”
–Wigfrid, when examining a Cooked Eel.
“We could slurp this down.”
–Webber, when examining a Cooked Eel.
“I'm not gonna eat just an eel old thing!”
–Walani, when examining a Cooked Eel.
“Could use some cajun spices...”
–Warly, when examining a Cooked Eel.
“Grilled urchin!”
–Woodlegs, when examining a Cooked Eel.
“'TAS BEEN PUT TO FIRE”
–Wilba, when examining a Cooked Eel.
“Not wiggly anymore”
–Wormwood, when examining a Cooked Eel.
“A nice appetizing shade of green.”
–Wheeler, when examining a Cooked Eel.
“I'll eat anything once.”
–Winona, when examining a Cooked Eel.
“I'd rather not put that in my flesh body.”
–Wortox, when examining a Cooked Eel.
“No!!”
–Wurt, when examining a Cooked Eel.
“That actually smells pretty good!”
–Walter, when examining a Cooked Eel.
“Oh good. My favorite.”
–Wanda, when examining a Cooked Eel.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Lươn là một loại thực phẩm Thịt tương tự như Cá và có thể câu được ở Ao Hoang được tìm thấy trong Tàn Tích và Ao trong bộ Có Nấm. Phơi Lươn trên Giá Phơi sẽ tạo ra Thịt Khô Nhỏ. Nó cũng có thể được sử dụng để thay thế Cá như một nguyên liệu tiên quyết trong các công thức nấu Nồi Hầm.

'''Eel''' is a [[Meats|Meat]] [[food]] [[item]] similar to [[Fish]] and can be fished in [[Wilds]] [[Ponds]] found in the [[Ruins]] and Ponds in the Toadstool setpiece. Drying an Eel on a [[Drying Rack]] will produce [[Small Jerky]]. It can also be used to replace [[Fish]] as a prerequisite in [[Crock Pot]] recipes.

Trading one Eel with the [[Pig King]] will yield five [[Gold Nugget]]s, while all other meat items yield one nugget.

Eels can be used for obtaining a large amount of gold in a relatively short amount of time via the Pig King, although by the time the player receives a large amount of Eels, they would have almost no need for gold requiring items.

However the ability to make [https://dontstarve.wiki.gg/wiki/Surf_%27n%27_Turf Surf 'n' Turf] while exploring the ruins can keep you fed and sane indefinitely.

'''Cooked Eel''' is obtained from cooking an Eel at a [[Campfire]], [[Fire Pit]], or [[Star Caller's Staff|Dwarf Star]]. It can be used to cook [[Fishsticks]] and [[Fish Tacos]] or as a filler in a Crock Pot. Like other cooked foods, it cannot be dried on the Drying Rack.

=={{pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==

* Eels were added to Wilds Ponds in the ''[[Version History#September 10.2C 2013 - A Moderately Friendly Update|Moderately Friendly Update]]''. Previously, Wilds Ponds used to produce Fish.
* [[Warly]]'s quote, "Anguille", is the French name for the [[Wikipedia:European eel|European Eel]].
